free_text: (gamma,n)  cross  sections  of nuclides near neutron
The Sr samples were in form of SrCO3,  the Y  was  in
form of Y2O3, and Zr samples were all in the form of
type detector:  BF3 counters  embedded  in  a  large
Penfold  method with 1-MeV bin for conversion
of the net yield curves into cross section curves.
Data were compiled at the Russia MSU SINP
